content_body:
When choosing your next vacation destination, finding the perfect place that appeals to your entire family (including your furry friends) may pose a challenge. Lucky for you, Cabin Rentals of Georgia offers an array of pet-friendly Blue Ridge luxury cabins so no one is left behind. Ranging from 2 to 5 bedrooms, our handpicked properties offer prime location, easy access, amenities for everyone, and beautiful views.

Just 90 miles north of Atlanta, Blue Ridge is the closest mountain town to the city and specializes in family-friendly and pet-friendly activities. No matter the season, a variety of things to do await you here! From exploring the North Georgia mountains via hiking trails or sipping the fabulous wines of the area, your pet is welcome to join you!

What Makes our Luxury Cabins Pet-Friendly


River Frontage from our Toccoa River Luxury Cabin Rentals

Chances are, your pup yearns for the great outdoors with its open fields and fresh water to splash in. Treat them and your family to a North Georgia vacation and give everyone a taste of freedom and wide open spaces.

When staying in and enjoying our pet-friendly cabin rentals, you and your four-legged best friend can catch up on some peace and quiet on our wraparound porches. Listen to the sounds of nature while you enjoy a glass of wine while your pet curls up at your feet. For our waterfront cabin rentals in Blue Ridge, enjoy a fun-filled afternoon exploring the rivers and creeks, perfect for finding Fido's next stick. Play fetch at our cabins with large yards and let your furry friend run like the wind.

The Best Pet-Friendly Cabins in Blue Ridge

We know that scouring vacation rentals is both draining, dizzying, and time-consuming, so here are our recommendations for your next pet-friendly vacation rental in Blue Ridge. These luxury cabins boast amenities for everyone, ranging from fully stocked kitchens to game rooms and riverfront access to close proximity to Blue Ridge's best activities.

  • Serendipity on Noontootla Creek

Perched above the Noontootla Creek, this 5-bedroom, 5.5-bathroom property holds the key to an adventurous getaway for everyone. Your pet will love running around the banks of the creek and exploring the nearby pet-friendly hiking trails in Blue Ridge. The wrap-around porches ensure your pet will have plenty to explore while staying close to you. For the rest of the family, King suites, chef's kitchen, "Treehouse" area with outdoor fireplace and hot tub, and expansive game room await you here. 

Perfect for couples or for large families, Serendipity is your answer for uniting everyone under one roof with a beautiful mountain and creek view! 

  • Creekside Green

Located on Fightingtown Creek, Creekside Green offers a quiet oasis for a party of two or small family to enjoy. Whether you're lounging with your pet on the screened-in porch, exploring the private pond, or enjoying the fire pit on the banks of the water, you can be sure to enjoy quality time at this idyllic cabin rental. 

Offering 2-bedrooms and 2-bathrooms, Creekside Green captures the essence of a home with all the modern upgrades. Smart TVs, a coffee bar, and extensive al fresco dining options are sure to add an extra touch of comfort to your stay. 

  • High Hopes

For those who prize paved access and a balance between beautiful mountain views and nearby Toccoa River frontage, High Hopes is the pet-friendly cabin for you! Boasting 4-bedrooms and 4.5-bathrooms, this luxury property in Blue Ridge is perfect for couples with its King and Queen suites and for pets with its many options for walks. Enjoy fires outside under the stars, shuffleboard tournaments, and board game nights after cooking meals together. 

Pet-Friendly Activities in Blue Ridge

  • Hiking

The crown jewel of Blue Ridge activities is its array of hiking trails branching off of the Appalachian trail and Benton-MacKaye trail. However, it can be challenging to determine what trails are best for your pet's paws! The Swinging Bridge, Fall Branch Falls, and Lake Blue Ridge Loop Trail are classic choices in the Aska Adventure Area providing beautiful views and easier, maintained trails.

  • Explore Downtown Blue Ridge

If there's one thing to know about Blue Ridge, it's that it is definitely pet-friendly! Most if not all of the shops in downtown Blue Ridge welcome well-behaved dogs inside, and many provide water bowls or snacks along the way! Downtown Blue Ridge's restaurants are the same way, ensuring you do not have to sacrifice a meal with your family over making sure your pet is taken care of. 

  • Dog-Friendly Breweries & Wineries


Courtesy of Roo Mountain Vineyards

For the adults in your group, spend an afternoon sipping your way around Blue Ridge with its many craft breweries and North Georgia wineries. With yard games, cabanas, or panoramic mountain views, these business are perfect for a sunny day in the mountains. Bring your pet for a fun-filled adventure!  

Reserve Your Luxury Getaway Today

When the perfect opportunity for travel falls in your lap, you take it. Our family-friendly and pet-friendly cabin rentals in Blue Ridge are your answer for a vacation that will leave you reminiscing for years to come. With indoor and outdoor activities that will leave your pet's tail wagging, let us at Cabin Rentals of Georgia help you plan your next getaway! (706) 432-2140
title: A Blue Ridge Getaway Your Dog Will Love
